title: 修复测试套件失败
description:
74/905 tests still failing (down from 106). Key failure categories:

1. PORT MISMATCH (port 3000 vs 1234): test/server/docker-m13.test.js, test/m74-docker-e2e.test.js, test/ui/web-ui.test.js — these expect port 3000 but code uses 1234. Should be resolved once port unification task lands.

2. IMPORT/MODULE ERRORS: test/server/server-layer.test.js (register is not a function), test/m77-sense-imports.test.js, test/m76-embed-wiring.test.js (dead import maps) — should be resolved once import map cleanup lands.

3. STALE TEST EXPECTATIONS: test/detector/optimizer.test.js (9 failures — tests expect setupOllama export from optimizer.js but it exports optimize/getOptimalConfig), test/cli/setup-m12.test.js (stale mock structure).

4. SENSE MODULE: test/runtime/sense.test.js, sense-pipeline.test.js, sense-wakeword-m80.test.js — adapter/import path issues.

5. TIMING: test/m95-profiler-instrumentation.test.js (1 flaky timing test).

Focus on categories 3-5 since 1-2 will be fixed by other review tasks.
